originalAlarm.description: Assigned value is garbage or undefined

reasoning: 30e053248da.c L31: 'int x = *length' reads uninitialized *length (// (6) ERROR). When CONFIG_SECURITY=F, security_old_inode_init_security() never writes *len (returns 0 immediately, L14-17), so *length remains uninitialized at L24. The call to reiserfs_security_init then reaches L31 where *length is read. PC=CONFIG_SECURITY=F correctly identifies the failing path. Known bug. Correctly constrained PC. Consistent with TRANSFORMATION_59 (TRUE).
